article_title: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War IV Takes Shape With Four Factions, 70-Plus Missions, and a 2026 Release Window

content_preview.title: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War IV Takes Shape With Four Factions, 70-Plus Missions, and a 2026 Release Window
content_preview.summary: KING Art Games and Deep Silver detail Dawn of War IV's four playable factions, campaign structure, and returning Last Stand mode ahead of Warhammer Skulls 2026.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War IV, developed by Bremen-based studio [KING Art Games](https://kingart-games.com/article/125-dawn-of-war-iv-announced) and published by [Deep Silver](https://www.deepsilver.com/games/dawn-of-war-iv), is set to release on Steam for Windows PC in 2026. Announced at Gamescom Opening Night Live on August 19, 2025, the game has been in development for nearly four years and represents the studio's most ambitious project to date — one that KING Art co-founder a...

editor_notes.content_quality: Thorough and well-structured gaming news article covering Dawn of War IV's confirmed features. Seven primary sources, most from official publisher/developer pages. Well-balanced between confirmed facts and unknowns.
editor_notes.source_verification: source-0.html.gz (kingart-games.com): Confirmed 110+ units and buildings, Last Stand returning, four campaigns. source-1.html.gz (deepsilver.com main): Confirmed 70+ missions, Blood Ravens and Dark Angels, Last Stand, Skirmish, multiplayer modes. source-2.html.gz (deepsilver.com meet-king-art): Confirmed Jan Theysen quotes, narrative emphasis, Games Workshop pitch invitation. source-3.html.gz (deepsilver.com ad-mech trailer): Confirmed April 21 Adeptus Mechanicus CGI trailer, Magos Dominus Nulpherus-1, Necron tomb on Kronus. source-4.html.gz (warhammer-community.com): Confirmed Alanah Pearce as 'actor, writer, director' host, 5pm BST start time, 'whole week of sales', confirmed Space Marine 2/Darktide/Boltgun 2 lineup. source-5.html.gz (invenglobal.com): Confirmed 10th anniversary, Mechanicus 2 unveil, Boltgun 2 in lineup. source-6.html.gz (space.com): Confirmed Kronus setting, 200 years after original, Cyrus and Jonah Orion, John French as co-writer, Lion El'Jonson appearance. Two minor claims unverified from snapshots: 'one-hour livestream' (the duration is not in sources) and 'May 28' as sales end date (source says 'whole week' but no specific end date). These are minor supporting details in a Skulls context paragraph.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All primary claims verified from official sources. Minor: (1) 'one-hour livestream' duration not found in any snapshot; (2) 'May 28' end date for digital sales not explicitly stated in sources (though consistent with 'whole week'). Neither affects headline, summary, or article substance.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and factual throughout. No editorializing or promotional tone despite using publisher/developer sources.
editor_notes.originality: No prior Dawn of War IV coverage in archive. Original topic.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Excellent article with 7 well-chosen primary sources. All core claims verified. Two very minor supporting details (event duration, sale end date) are approximate but consistent with available sources. APPROVE.
